title: Histogram Statistics Analysis cannot apply on standby database
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE histogram_stats (id INTEGER, bucket INTEGER, frequency INTEGER);
INSERT INTO histogram_stats (id, bucket, frequency) SELECT id, 1, COUNT(*) FROM test2 GROUP BY id LIMIT 5;
SELECT * FROM histogram_stats WHERE id IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Histogram statistics not applied on standby database
